creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is a mistake in the previous version of the patch, which makes
xorg-server fail to build.  Please use the attached patch instead, or
pull the latest version from
http://people.freebsd.org/~zeising/xorg-mesaupdate.diff
Sorry for the inconvenience!
Regards!
-- 
Niclas Zeising
